executives.name: David Solomon
executives.background: David M. Solomon is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. He previously served as President and Chief Operating Officer and as Co-Head of the Investment Banking Division.

executives.name: Denis Coleman
executives.background: Denis Coleman is Chief Financial Officer of The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. He previously served as Co-Head of the Global Financing Group and as a member of the Management Committee.

executives.name: John Waldron
executives.background: John E. Waldron is President and Chief Operating Officer of The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. He previously served as Co-Head of the Investment Banking Division.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Operating Officer; Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Brian Bolster
executives.background: Mr. Bolster is Executive Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer of NextEra Energy. Prior to joining NextEra Energy, he was managing director and global head of natural resources investment banking at Goldman Sachs.

tenure_dates.title: Global Head of Power and Infrastructure Investment Banking

executives.name: Edith Cooper
executives.background: Co-founder of Medley and former Global Head of Human Capital Management at Goldman Sachs.

tenure_dates.title: Global Head of Human Capital Management

executives.name: Jan Tighe
executives.background: Retired Vice Admiral, United States Navy.

executives.name: John Thornton
executives.background: Executive Chairman, Barrick Gold Corporation; Former President, Goldman Sachs.

executives.name: Kevin Johnson
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Starbucks Corporation.

executives.name: Michele Burns
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Mercer LLC. Former CFO of Delta Air Lines, Inc. and Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc.

executives.name: Paul Graves
executives.background: Mr. Graves has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a director since May 2018. Before joining Livent, Mr. Graves was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of FMC from 2012 to 2018. He previously served as a partner in the Investment Banking Division at Goldman Sachs Group in Hong Kong and was co-head of Natural Resources in Asia.

executives.name: Ryan O'Connor
executives.background: Chief Executive Officer of Global X Management Company LLC since April 2024. Previously held various leadership roles at Goldman Sachs Asset Management.

tenure_dates.title: Global Head of ETF Product, Goldman Sachs Asset Management
